import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint"

import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes"

import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem"
import Heading from "@theme/Heading"
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate"

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Issue API Key"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"post"} path={"/v2alpha1/admin/issuedApiKeys"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

Creates a new API key for a given actor. The secret is returned only once in the response and cannot be retrieved later. Keys can
be scoped with specific permissions and have optional expiration.

```http
POST /v2alpha1/admin/issuedApiKeys
{
  "name": "production-service",
  "actor_id": "user_123",
  "scopes": ["read", "write"],
  "ttl": "8760h"
}
```

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
